zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Senlis V於1218年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Simon de Senlis IV54歲，母親Amicia of Huntingdon52歲。他和Anne Bullistra至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1296年在英國諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Senlis V于1218年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Simon de Senlis IV54岁，母亲Amicia of Huntingdon52岁。他和Anne Bullistra至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1296年在英国諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Senlis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Senlis V was born in 1218, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Simon de Senlis IV, was 54 and his mother, Amicia of Huntingdon, was 52. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Anne Bullistra. He died in 1296, in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Senlis V est né en 1218, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon de Senlis IV, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Amicia of Huntingdon, avait 52 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Anne Bullistra. Il est décédé en 1296, à Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Senlis V 1218 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Senlis IV 54 und seine Mutter Amicia of Huntingdon 52. Er hatte mit Anne Bullistra mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1296 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Senlis V è nato il nel 1218 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Simon de Senlis IV, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Amicia of Huntingdon, aveva 52 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Anne Bullistra. Morì nel 1296, nel Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Senlis Vが1218年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Simon de Senlis IVは54歳，母Amicia of Huntingdonは52歳であった。彼はAnne Bullistraとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1296年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルスで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Senlis V(이)가 1218년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Senlis IV(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Amicia of Huntingdon(은)는 52세였다. 그는 Anne Bullistra(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년 영국 노르섬프토실르 워k워스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Senlis V nasceu em 1218, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon de Senlis IV, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Amicia of Huntingdon, tinha 52 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Anne Bullistra. Ele faleceu em 1296, em Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Senlis V родился в 1218 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon de Senlis IV было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Amicia of Huntingdon, 52. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Anne Bullistra. Он умер в 1296 г. в местности варкворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Senlis V nació en 1218, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon de Senlis IV, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Amicia of Huntingdon, tenía 52 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Anne Bullistra. Murió en 1296, en Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
